metadata.title: Device Support
metadata.description: Check if your phone supports eSIM. Review compatible devices and requirements before activation.
metadata.keywords: device support, esim compatible, phone compatibility, esim devices

hero.description: Before purchasing an eSIM plan, make sure your device supports eSIM technology and is carrier-unlocked. Most modern smartphones support eSIM, but compatibility can vary by model and country of purchase.

registry.title: Popular Supported Devices
registry.description: Use this list to check whether your device is eSIM-compatible. Some regional models may not support eSIM, even when the main model does.

items.title: eSIM Support
items.copy: Your device must support eSIM technology.

items.title: Carrier Unlocked
items.copy: Your phone must not be locked to a specific mobile carrier.

items.title: Latest Software
items.copy: Update your device to the latest available software version.

items.title: Internet Connection
items.copy: You need an internet connection to download and install your eSIM profile.
